overview.description: The PGIM S&P 500 Buffer 20 ETF - May (PBMY) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in downside hedge alternatives. The fund aims for specific buffered losses and capped gains on the SPDR S&P 500 ETF Trust over a specific holdings period. The actively managed fund holds options and collateral. PBMY was launched on May 1, 2024 and is issued by PGIM.
